steps.title: Substitute each time into the distance formula
steps.content:
Evaluate $d = 60t$ at both times:
  • After $12k$ hours: $d = 60(12k) = 720k$ miles
  • After $4k$ hours: $d = 60(4k) = 240k$ miles

steps.title: Calculate the ratio
steps.content:
Divide the distance at $12k$ hours by the distance at $4k$ hours:
$$\frac{720k}{240k} = \frac{720}{240} = 3$$
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
